title: TPMS Sensor ID Registration / Learn
description: Register new or relearned tire pressure sensor IDs with the TPMS module after sensor replacement or tire rotation.
common_symptoms: TPMS warning light after tire rotation
physical_solution: Register new sensor RF IDs into the TPMS ECU so each wheel position is correctly mapped and monitored.

technical_solution.elm327_feasibility: Partial — direct sensor learn via relearn mode (driving or magnet activation) most reliable. Scan-tool $2E write of sensor IDs possible on some OEMs with correct DID.
preconditions: New sensors installed and inflated to correct pressure
Vehicle stationary for scan-tool learn, or ready to drive for auto-learn

procedure_steps.description: Record new sensor IDs from packaging (6-8 hex digits per sensor).
Option A (scan write): $2E [TPMS_ID_DID] [SENSOR_ID_BYTES] for each wheel position.
Option B (relearn mode): activate TPMS relearn mode via $31 01 [RELEARN_ROUTINE]. Use TPMS activation tool at each wheel (LF→RF→RR→LR order).
Read back sensor IDs: $22 [TPMS_DID]. Confirm all 4 positions populated.
Drive above 15 mph for 5-10 minutes. Confirm TPMS warning light extinguishes.

oem_notes.Toyota/Lexus: Auto-relearn after driving >25mph for 10 min on most models. Scan tool relearn available on newer platforms.
oem_notes.Honda/Acura: Direct and indirect TPMS varies by model/year. Scan tool learn path via HDS.
oem_notes.Nissan/Infiniti: CONSULT III+ relearn procedure. Activation tool or driving relearn.
oem_notes.GM: Auto-learn: drive >15mph for 10+ min after relearn mode activation. Scan relearn also available.
oem_notes.VW/Audi: Direct TPMS (RDK): scan write of sensor IDs via VCDS/ODIS. Indirect: manual threshold set.
oem_notes.Stellantis: Activation tool relearn most common. Scan-tool path via CAN-IHS (pins 3/11).
oem_notes.Hyundai/Kia: Activation tool relearn or auto-learn driving. GDS scan path on newer models.
oem_notes.Ford: Programmed learn mode via steering menu. Activation tool triggers each sensor. Auto-learn after driving.
